---
title: "What Is Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO)?"
date: 2026-04-20T10:00:00.000Z
category: "GEO Fundamentals"
excerpt: "GEO is the practice of optimising your content to be cited by AI-powered search engines and large language models. Here's what you need to know."
readTime: "8 min"
featured: true
---

Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO) is the practice of making your website content discoverable, retrievable, and citable by AI-powered search engines such as ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Claude.

## How GEO differs from traditional SEO

While SEO focuses on ranking in a list of blue links, GEO focuses on being **cited** in an AI-generated answer. The fundamental shift is from visibility to citability.
